chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 535 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 01.11.2023 Mr. Muhammad Raza Soomro, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel submits that this petition has served its purpose as the petitioner has been appointed, therefore, he does not press this petition. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
